javadoc_after:
/** * Classes implementing this interface indicate that they want to close * some underlying resource or resources when the enclosing {@link Store} * is closed. * *

Note that the {@code CloseableResource} API is only honored for * objects stored within an extension context {@link Store}. * * @since 5.1 */
